narrative:
Rose (precinct in Carroll County) has 1,038 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a clear Republican lean of 9.6 percentage points.
